chief_complaint: A 50-year-old male patient presented with intracerebral hemorrhage in the left thalamus, surrounding perifocal edema, and left lateral intraventricular hemorrhage.
history: The patient was admitted to Cipto Mangunkusumo National General Hospital, Jakarta, in 2022. He was given mesenchymal stem cells (MSCs) treatment three times through Digital Subtraction Angiography (DSA).
exam: Vital signs and physical examination findings were not provided.
labs: Imaging studies: intracerebral hemorrhage in the left thalamus, surrounding perifocal edema, and left lateral intraventricular hemorrhage.
correct_diagnosis: Intracerebral hemorrhage in the left thalamus
differentials: Intracerebral hemorrhage in the left thalamus
correct_ranking: Intracerebral hemorrhage in the left thalamus
